description_long: This object is a rectangular record player with a dark gray body and four short, sturdy legs. The circular turntable platter is centrally located and slightly recessed, with a small white spindle at its center. A long, angular tonearm extends from the right side, featuring a white and gray color scheme with a red stylus tip, and rests over the platter. There are several control buttons and switches on the front right and back left corners, rendered as raised, blocky shapes in white and gray. The surface finish appears matte and the overall design is minimalist, with no visible dust cover. The object is compact and solid, suitable for placement on a table or shelf in an urban environment.
description: A compact, blocky record player with a dark gray body, white and gray tonearm, and several control buttons. The platter is centrally located and the design is minimalist with no dust cover.
description_view_0: The record player is seen from a side angle, highlighting the circular platter, tonearm resting over it, and a few control buttons on the corners.
description_view_1: A front-facing view showing the tonearm extending toward the viewer, the red stylus tip, and the main control buttons on the right.
description_view_2: The rear side reveals the back of the tonearm assembly and the platter, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_3: A direct view of the opposite front, showing two square control buttons and the tonearm extending away.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located, occupying a significant portion of the top surface. It is dark gray, slightly recessed, and features a small white spindle at its center. The platter appears smooth with subtle blocky texturing, and no visible grooves or decorative patterns.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, long, and angular, extending from the right side of the device. It is primarily white with gray segments and a red tip, likely representing the stylus. The tonearm is resting over the platter and appears to have a pivoting joint at its base.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small red block at the end of the tonearm, attached as a distinct component. It is compact and positioned above the platter, suggesting it is ready for playback.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control buttons and switches visible: two square white buttons on the front right, a rectangular white button on the back left, and a small gray switch near the tonearm base. All are blocky and raised, with no visible labels or markings.
